description_long: This object is a compact, curved-blade tool with a distinctive ergonomic handle and a sharp, pointed tip. The handle is black, contoured for grip, and features a prominent finger ring at the end, likely for improved control and safety during use. The blade is slender, highly curved, and transitions from a metallic gold at the base to a gradient of purple and pink hues toward the tip, giving it a striking visual appearance. The overall construction suggests a robust build, with the handle likely made of a hard plastic or composite material and the blade of metal. No visible screws, fasteners, or brand markings are present on the exterior. The object appears clean and well-maintained, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A compact, curved-blade tool with a black ergonomic handle and a gradient-colored metallic blade, featuring a finger ring for grip. The object is visually striking and appears robust and pristine.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow profile of the handle and the sharp, pointed tip of the blade.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the curved blade with its gradient coloration and the contoured black handle with a finger ring.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the slim handle and the thinness of the blade, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the full curvature of the blade and the ergonomic handle with finger grooves and ring.
attribute_handle_type: contoured, black, plastic, ergonomic with finger grooves and a finger ring
